text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If you're lookin' for an emcee, look no further than me: the
silver-tongued, world's strongest—ELLLL CONDOR PASAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I think El's conjuring the wrong type of emcee for this, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I grant you the right to hear my inspirational words! Be
grateful!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...On second thought, this concert celebrates all of us. Perhaps it
would be more appropriate to express my individuality as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try leading the audience in a final clap to end the
festivities. ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So, um, the next song is... Hehe, hehe! Ah no! I laughed again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Urara? Have I missed something?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking of how big and full of fun this concert is going to
be, and it made me so excited, I started laughing during my emcee
speech.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you've no need to withhold your laughter! The audience
came to see you, meaning it is unnecessary that you force a
performative persona!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really?! I see! Then I can be an emcee who laughs all the time!
